name: Dongguan Kingsun Optoelectronic Co.,Ltd.
summary: Dongguan Kingsun Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells LED lighting products worldwide. The company offers street lights, tunnel lights, wall packs, garden lights, bollards, parking lot lights, and solar lights for roads and areas; high bay and low bay lights, and canopy lights for industrial applications; and flood, projection, wallwash, in-ground, linear, and pixel lights for architectural applications. It also provides smart lights, bulbs, tubes, battens, downlights, panel lights, spotlights, ceiling lights, pendant lights, table lamps, floor lights, and wall lights for residential and commercial applications. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Dongguan, China.
